findings.description: Source 使用方法 h2 section contains >= 2000 characters of plain text with 6 h3 subsections (システム日時設定, システム日時取得, 業務日付設定, 業務日付取得, 業務日付上書き, 業務日付更新), but the knowledge file does not split this into separate sections — all content is combined into s3.
findings.source_evidence: RST h2 '使用方法' spans from the heading to '拡張例', containing six ~~ h3 subsections with multiple code blocks and a table.

findings.description: `SystemRepository` is a PascalCase class name referenced in the s3 Java code example (`SystemRepository.get("businessDateProvider")`) but is absent from s3's hints array.
